description: Dub is a link attribution platform for short links, conversion tracking, analytics, and affiliate or referral program management. It provides products for managing links, measuring conversions, and running partner programs.
summary: dub.co exposes a REST API at `https://api.dub.co`, two remote MCP servers at `https://mcp.dub.sh/mcp/dub-partners` and `https://mcp.dub.sh/mcp/dub-links`, and a `dub` CLI; all documented developer-callable surfaces require a Dub API key.
